_publications._publicationTitle: PET Imaging of Neurofibromatosis Type 1 with a Fluorine-18 Labeled Tryptophan Radiotracer.

_contextSnippet: First, we performed 60-min static scans in wild-type mice and NF1 tumor mice with L-[18F]FETrp and compared the imaging results with the most widely used PET radiotracer, FDG
details: Successfully performed 60-min static scans and dynamic PET imaging in both wild-type and NF1 tumor mice, enabling quantitative SUV measurements and kinetic analysis
